blended.narrative: Pebble Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 21.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
